description: KMC Market Module database for managing municipal markets, stalls, tenants (RPH holders), stallage demands, collections, mutations, and permissions across Kolkata Municipal Corporation.
important_rules: Always prefix table names with schema: mrkt_kmc2_data.<table_name>
Financial year (mrkt_fin_year) format is 'YYYY-YYYY' e.g. '2024-2025'
Dates are stored as 'timestamp without time zone' — use ::date for date comparisons
mrkt_code is the primary key linking markets across all tables
mrkt_stall_id is the primary key linking stalls across demand, receipt, rent_roll tables
CRITICAL: mrkt_stall_id encodes location — first 3 digits = mrkt_code, digits 4-5 = phase_code, digits 6-7 = block_code. Example: stall_id 2050101 means market 205, phase 01, block 01
Join market_mst to stall: SUBSTR(CAST(stall_id AS text),1,3) = CAST(mrkt_code AS text)
Join block_mst to stall: LPAD(CAST(phase_code AS text),2,'0') || LPAD(CAST(block_code AS text),2,'0') = SUBSTR(CAST(stall_id AS text),4,4)
Ward number is stored in mrkt_market_mst.common_ward_no as VARCHAR, cast to integer for numeric comparisons

Demand status: 'A'=Active, 'P'=Partially Paid, 'F'=Fully Paid, 'O'=Outstanding, 'B'=Bad Demand, 'C'=Canceled. For demands that still have an outstanding balance use: mrkt_demand_status IN ('A','P','O'). For fully paid demands filter: mrkt_demand_status = 'F'. For all valid (non-cancelled, non-bad) demands use: mrkt_demand_status NOT IN ('C','B')
mrkt_demand_type: 'R'=Regular, 'S'=Supplementary

Charge codes in mrkt_demand_dtl.mrkt_misc_chrg_code: '22'=Stallage, '21'=Electricity, '1'=CGST on Stallage, '6'=CGST on Electricity, '8'=SGST on Stallage, '23'=SGST on Electricity, '26'=Difference of Stallage, '37'=Maintenance Charge. Mutation-related codes: '18','24','25','27','28','31','32','33'. Other misc codes: '2','3','4','5','7','9','10','11','12','13','14','15','16','17','29','30'

Stallage group = codes '22' + '1' + '8' (stallage + CGST + SGST). Electricity group = codes '21' + '6' + '23' (electricity + CGST + SGST). Mutation group = codes '18','24','25','27','28','31','32','33'. Diff of stallage = '26'. Maintenance = '37'

For stall-wise demand-collection reports that need all statuses (active + partially paid + fully paid + outstanding), use: mrkt_demand_status IN ('A','P','F','O'). This covers all non-cancelled and non-bad-demand records.
For misc demand (mrkt_misc_demand_hdr): demand_status filter uses COALESCE(mrkt_demand_status,'A') NOT IN ('C','B') to include NULLs as active. For paid misc demands filter: mrkt_demand_status = 'F'

CRITICAL TABLE DISTINCTION — mrkt_demand_hdr vs mrkt_misc_demand_hdr: (1) mrkt_demand_hdr (regular stallage) has mrkt_from_date (period start) and mrkt_to_date (period end). (2) mrkt_misc_demand_hdr (miscellaneous charges) does NOT have mrkt_from_date or mrkt_to_date — it has mrkt_demand_date (demand creation date) and mrkt_payment_date (payment date). NEVER use mrkt_from_date on mrkt_misc_demand_hdr.

CRITICAL TABLE DISTINCTION — misc receipts vs regular receipts: For MISCELLANEOUS demand receipts always use mrkt_misc_receipt_hdr (NOT mrkt_receipt_hdr). Join key is mrkt_demand_serial_no + mrkt_fin_year + mrkt_code. Payment mode for misc receipts is in mrkt_misc_receipt_pay_dtl (joined via mrkt_demand_serial_no + mrkt_fin_year + mrkt_code). Cancel filter: cancel_flag IS NOT TRUE — cancel_flag is BOOLEAN (true/false/null), NOT varchar. Never write COALESCE(cancel_flag,'N') != 'Y'

CRITICAL column absence in mrkt_misc_demand_hdr: This table does NOT have mrkt_outstanding_amt, mrkt_rebate_amount, mrkt_from_date, or mrkt_to_date. The exact column names with mrkt_ prefix are: mrkt_demand_amount, mrkt_penalty_amount, mrkt_net_amount, mrkt_paid_amount. NEVER write penalty_amount — the full name is mrkt_penalty_amount. NEVER write paid_amount — the full name is mrkt_paid_amount. Do not drop the mrkt_ prefix from any column in this table.

CRITICAL column absence in mrkt_misc_demand_dtl: This table ONLY has mrkt_demand_amount as an amount column. It does NOT have penalty_amount, mrkt_penalty_amount, mrkt_paid_amount, mrkt_outstanding_amt, or mrkt_rebate_amount. For penalty/paid/net totals always reference mrkt_misc_demand_hdr, not the detail table.

Cross-schema access: Collection budget data is in coll_kmc1_data schema (tables: coll_daily_budget_colln, coll_daily_budget_gm, chln_ns_portal). Joined via mrkt_bicode_prefix in mrkt_market_mst matching SUBSTRING(coll_budget_code FROM 1 FOR 4)

mrkt_bicode_prefix in mrkt_market_mst is the BI (Budget Item) code prefix used for financial reporting. Budget code format: first 4 chars = market prefix, chars 6+ = charge category code (221,222,223,224,226,299 etc.)
Point consumption: active points have mrkt_active_flag='Y' AND mrkt_effective_to_year IS NULL AND mrkt_effect_to_month IS NULL
Connection type in rent_roll_mst: 'K'=KMC Meter, 'P'=Point-based, 'C'=CESC meter, 'N'=No Electric
AC flag in rent_roll_mst: mrkt_with_ac '1'=AC, '2'=NON-AC, 'N'=NON-AC
RPH means Record of Permission Holder — the tenant/licensee of a stall
Stallage = monthly rent charged for a market stall
Futnani = footpath/pavement charges (separate demand/receipt tables)
Outstanding amount = mrkt_outstanding_amt in demand tables
Demand amount formula: mrkt_demand_amount + COALESCE(mrkt_penalty_amount,0) + COALESCE(mrkt_outstanding_amt,0) - COALESCE(mrkt_advance_amt,0)
Market code 504 has special handling — stall area shown as 'NA'
Stallage rate per sqft = mrkt_mon_stallage / (stall_area_original + subfloor_area + upperfloor_area + excess_area). For AC stalls subtract 1/5th AC surcharge first
Always use ONLY SELECT statements — never INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, DROP
For active records check: status = 1 or status IS NULL (older records may not have status column)
Payment mode (mrkt_pay_mode): 'C'=Cash, 'Q'=Cheque, 'D'=DD (Demand Draft). Note: 'O'=Online is listed in schema but actual data only has C/D/Q
Meter reading basis: 'C'=Calculated from actual reading, 'A'=Average/estimated reading
Use COALESCE for nullable numeric fields to avoid NULL in calculations
Use ILIKE for case-insensitive text searches (e.g. tenant name, trade name)
Active tenant filter: mrkt_rent_roll_mst.mrkt_status = 'O' (Open). C=Closed means tenancy ended

CRITICAL COLUMN DISTINCTION — stall status vs tenant status: mrkt_stall_mst has NO column called mrkt_status. The stall active/inactive column in mrkt_stall_mst is simply `status` (integer: 1=Active, 0=Inactive). NEVER write stall_alias.mrkt_status — it does not exist and will cause a DB error. The column mrkt_status belongs ONLY to mrkt_rent_roll_mst. Correct usage: s.status = 1 for active stalls (mrkt_stall_mst); rr.mrkt_status = 'O' for active tenants (mrkt_rent_roll_mst).
Active demand generation: mrkt_rent_roll_mst.mrkt_demand_flag = 'R' (Regular). D=Defunct means no bill generated
Active electricity meter connection: mrkt_kmc_meter_conn.mrkt_active_flag = 'Y'
Active monthly meter reading: mrkt_kmc_mtr_monchg.mrkt_active_flag = 'Y'
mrkt_demand_hdr.mrkt_demand_type is always 'R' (Regular) for stallage — misc demands use mrkt_misc_demand_hdr with type 'M'
mrkt_demand_hdr.mrk_outstanding_flag: 'O'=Open/unpaid demand, 'C'=Closed/fully paid

For electricity consumption queries: join mrkt_kmc_meter_conn (active_flag='Y') → mrkt_kmc_mtr_monchg (active_flag='Y') via mrkt_stall_id. Consumption = mrkt_consumption_val units; charge rate from mrkt_meter_unit_rate_mst by mrkt_supply_type
Point-based electricity: stalls with mrkt_rent_roll_mst.mrkt_connection_type='P' use mrkt_point_consumption (active_flag='Y' AND mrkt_effective_to_year IS NULL) — no individual meter
mrkt_rent_roll_mst.mrkt_endreason_flag end reason codes: 0=No reason, B=Bankruptcy, W=Willful surrender, O=Other, A=Abandonment, D=Death, M=Mutation/transfer, K=KMC reclaimed, L=Legal eviction
mrkt_rent_roll_mst.mrkt_allot_basis: U=Unlicensed, P=Permission, F=Free hold, I=Inherited, T=Tender
mrkt_rent_roll_mst.mrkt_with_ac: '1'=Air Conditioned stall, '2'=Non-AC, 'N'=Non-AC (legacy)
Financial year range in data: 2005-2006 through 2025-2026. Current FY is 2025-2026
Markets appear as mrkt_code numeric: 101,102,103,104,105,201,202,203,305,306,307,314,401,417 etc. Market 417=Futnani market (footpath traders)

mrkt_market_mst.description: Master list of all KMC markets

common_ward_no.desc: Ward number (cast to int for comparisons)

mrkt_stall_mst.description: Master list of all stalls in markets

mrkt_rent_roll_mst.description: Tenant/RPH (Record of Permission Holder) details for each stall — the person/business occupying the stall

mrkt_demand_hdr.description: Stallage demand headers — monthly/periodic bills generated for stall holders

mrkt_demand_status.desc: A=Active/Approved (current demand), F=Finalized/Fully paid, O=Old/Outstanding, P=Partial payment, B=Bad debt, C=Cancelled. Unpaid filter: IN ('A','F','O')

mrkt_demand_type.desc: R=Regular stallage demand (only value in active data)

joins_to: mrkt_demand_dtl via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_code AND mrkt_fin_year
mrkt_receipt_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_code AND mrkt_fin_year

mrkt_demand_dtl.description: Demand line items — breakup of charges within a demand
joins_to: mrkt_demand_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_code AND mrkt_fin_year

mrkt_receipt_hdr.description: Payment receipt headers — records of payments made against demands
joins_to: mrkt_demand_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_code AND mrkt_fin_year
mrkt_receipt_dtl via mrkt_receipt_no AND mrkt_receipt_year AND mrkt_code
mrkt_receipt_pay_dtl via mrkt_receipt_no AND mrkt_receipt_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_receipt_dtl.description: Receipt line items — breakup of payment across charge types
joins_to: mrkt_receipt_hdr via mrkt_receipt_no AND mrkt_receipt_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_receipt_pay_dtl.description: Payment mode details — how the payment was made (cash/cheque/DD/online)
joins_to: mrkt_receipt_hdr via mrkt_receipt_no AND mrkt_receipt_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_futnani_demand_hdr.description: Futnani (footpath/pavement) charge demand headers — same structure as stallage demands

joins_to: mrkt_futnani_demand_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_code AND mrkt_fin_year

mrkt_misc_demand_hdr.description: Miscellaneous charges demand headers. DOES NOT have mrkt_from_date, mrkt_to_date, mrkt_outstanding_amt, or mrkt_rebate_amount. Use mrkt_demand_date for date filtering. Amount columns: mrkt_demand_amount, mrkt_penalty_amount, mrkt_net_amount, mrkt_paid_amount only.

mrkt_demand_date.desc: Demand creation date — USE THIS for date filtering (NOT mrkt_from_date)

mrkt_penalty_amount.desc: Penalty amount — exact column name is mrkt_penalty_amount (NOT penalty_amount). Use COALESCE(mrkt_penalty_amount, 0)

mrkt_demand_status.desc: A=Active, P=Partially Paid, F=Fully Paid, O=Outstanding, B=Bad Demand, C=Canceled

mrkt_bad_demand_reason.desc: Reason for marking as bad demand

mrkt_misc_demand_hdr.ABSENT_columns: mrkt_from_date, mrkt_to_date, mrkt_outstanding_amt, mrkt_rebate_amount — these do NOT exist in this table
joins_to: mrkt_misc_receipt_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_fin_year AND mrkt_code
mrkt_misc_demand_dtl via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_fin_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_misc_demand_dtl.description: Miscellaneous demand line items — charge code breakup for each misc demand. One row per charge type per demand. ONLY amount column is mrkt_demand_amount. Does NOT have penalty_amount, mrkt_penalty_amount, mrkt_paid_amount, mrkt_outstanding_amt, or mrkt_rebate_amount.

mrkt_demand_serial_no.desc: Demand serial (FK to mrkt_misc_demand_hdr, join key)

mrkt_demand_amount.desc: Charge amount for this line item — ONLY amount column in this table

mrkt_misc_demand_dtl.ABSENT_columns: penalty_amount, mrkt_penalty_amount, mrkt_paid_amount, mrkt_outstanding_amt, mrkt_rebate_amount — these do NOT exist in mrkt_misc_demand_dtl. For penalty/paid/net amounts use mrkt_misc_demand_hdr.
joins_to: mrkt_misc_demand_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_fin_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_misc_receipt_hdr.description: Miscellaneous charges payment receipts. USE THIS table (NOT mrkt_receipt_hdr) for misc demand receipts. Join to mrkt_misc_demand_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no + mrkt_fin_year + mrkt_code.

mrkt_receipt_date.desc: Payment date — use ::date for date comparisons

mrkt_demand_serial_no.desc: Linked demand serial (join key to mrkt_misc_demand_hdr)

cancel_flag.desc: TRUE=Cancelled receipt. Filter MUST be: cancel_flag IS NOT TRUE (it is BOOLEAN not varchar — do NOT use COALESCE with 'N' or compare to 'Y')

joins_to: mrkt_misc_demand_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_fin_year AND mrkt_code
mrkt_misc_receipt_pay_dtl via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_fin_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_misc_receipt_pay_dtl.description: Payment mode details for miscellaneous demand receipts — how the misc payment was made. Join via mrkt_demand_serial_no + mrkt_fin_year + mrkt_code.
joins_to: mrkt_misc_receipt_hdr via mrkt_demand_serial_no AND mrkt_fin_year AND mrkt_code

mrkt_stall_mutation.description: Stall mutation/transfer records — change of RPH holder, trade name, business type

mrkt_permission_master.description: Permission records — issued after mutation/transfer approval

mrkt_block_mst.description: Block/section master within a market phase

mrkt_stalltype_mst.description: Stall type master (e.g. Shop, Godown, Open, Cabin)

mrkt_allottype_mst.description: Allotment type master (e.g. Tender, Allotment, Heritage)

mrkt_business_mst.description: Business type master (e.g. Fish, Vegetable, Grocery, Cloth)

mrkt_misc_charge_mst.description: Miscellaneous charge type master (stallage, electricity, water, etc.)

mrkt_stallage_rate_mst.description: Stallage rate master — rate per sq ft by market, stall type, financial year

mrkt_daily_journal.description: Daily accounting journal entries for market collections

mrkt_kmc_meter_conn.description: KMC electricity meter connections for stalls — 6,489 active/inactive connections. Contains meter number, supply type (AC/DC), ampere rating, installation date, security deposit

mrkt_kmc_mtr_monchg.description: Monthly KMC electricity meter readings and consumption charges — 1,010,933 rows, one row per stall per month. Use this for electricity consumption queries, unit calculation, and billing

mrkt_consumption_val.desc: Units consumed = cur_reading - prev_reading (adjusted for rollover)

mrkt_cur_reading_date.desc: Date when current reading was taken

mrkt_charge_amount.desc: Electricity charge amount for this month

mrkt_point_consumption.description: Point-based electricity consumption for stalls with point connections

mrkt_adjust_hdr.description: Demand adjustment headers — 41,639 rows. Tracks positive/negative adjustments to demands. mrkt_adjustment_type: P=Positive (credit), N=Negative (debit). mrkt_plus_minus_flag: + or -

mrkt_meter_unit_rate_mst.description: KMC electricity meter unit rate master — 2 rows, one per supply type (AC/DC). Contains per-unit electricity charge rate used to compute electricity bills from consumption

mrkt_unit_rate.desc: Rate per unit of electricity consumption

mrkt_min_charge.desc: Minimum charge even if consumption is zero

mrkt_rentroll_stallage_dtl.description: Stallage rate history per rent roll — 27,629 rows. Tracks stallage rate changes over time with effective year/month. Used to find historical rate at a given date

mrkt_effective_year.desc: Year from which this rate is effective

mrkt_effective_month.desc: Month from which this rate is effective

mrkt_stallage_rate.desc: Stallage rate amount for this period

mrkt_point_charg_mst.description: Point-based electricity charge rates master — 126 rows. Defines charge per point type for stalls with point connections (no individual meter)

mrkt_charge_rate.desc: Charge rate per point per month

mrkt_insp_rpt_hdr.description: Market inspection report headers — 358 inspections. mrkt_type: Private/KMC/Others market ownership

mrkt_event_permission_applications.description: Event permission applications for conducting events in markets
